text:
Once upon a quiet Saturday, there was an old, wise tree named Oakley. Across the street lived a lively cat called Whiskers. Whiskers was always curious about everything and everyone, but he had never traveled very far. One sunny morning, armed with a sense of adventure, he packed his carrier.

Whiskers sauntered over to Oakley with his belly rubs. "Mr. Oakley," he meowed, "I've decided to go on a journey! To explore the great outdoors!"

Oakley gazed down at Whiskers with his great, knowing eyes. "First," he said, "we have to find a map."

Whiskers sniffed around. "But, Mr. Oakley, I have a map inside my collar!"

With a chuckle, Oakley tapped Whiskers' collar. "Well, that's one. Look for a thing called a 'compass.'"
